conclusion.title: Discovery of superconductivity with record transition temperature in Hg-Ba-Ca-Cu-O

conclusion: The Hg-Ba-Ca-Cu-O system exhibits superconductivity with an onset transition temperature of $T_{c} \approx 133.5$ K, which surpasses the previous record of $\sim 127$ K observed in the Tl-system. This result is established through magnetic susceptibility measurements (showing diamagnetism onset at 133.5 K and strong screening at 125 K) and electrical resistivity measurements (showing a sharp drop at $132.5$ K and zero resistance at $95$ K).
